text:
The uncontested G.O.A.T. of American women's gymnastics,Simone Biles,has seemingly responded to an unsavory remark made by a former Team USA teammate of hers.ГӮ

ГўВҖВңBesides Simone, I feel like the talent and the depth just isnГўВҖВҷt like what it used to be,ГўВҖВқ her former teammate, MyKayla Skinner said in a YouTube video posted after the team selection.ГӮВ Skinner, who earned a silver medal on the vault at the Tokyo Olympics, said in the since-deleted video.ГӮВ ГўВҖВңA lot of girls donГўВҖВҷt work as hard. The girls just donГўВҖВҷt have the work ethic.ГўВҖВқ

Biles seemed to clap back at the time witha postshared to social platform Threads, writing, "Not everyone needs a mic and a platform."ГӮ

Following the women's all-around gold medalvictoryГӮВ at the Paris Olympics on Tuesday, Biles took to her Instagram account to shareimagesof the squad ГўВҖВ” including herself, Jordan Chiles, Suni Lee, Jade Carey and Hezly Rivera ГўВҖВ” celebrating their win, which earned Biles' her eighth gold medal and the title of most-decorated American Olympics gymnast of all time.ГӮВ "Lack of talent, lazy, olympic champions," Biles captioned her post, an ostensible reference to comments made by Skinner.

https://www.instagram.com/p/C-ESNIFIQ8l/

While Skinner initially defended her remarks, she later apologized in a statement shared to X/Twitter after receiving an adverse public response.ГӮВ ГўВҖВңIt was not my intention to offend of disrespect any of the athletes or to take away from their hard work,ГўВҖВқ she wrote. ГўВҖВңI take full responsibility for what I said and I deeply apologize.ГўВҖВқ

The latest development in the simmering tension between the two athletes came on Wednesday, when Biles claimed that Skinner had blocked her Instagram account. "Oop IГўВҖВҷve been blocked," Bilestweeted,along with several emojis. Chiles separately posted an image on her Instagram story of someone holding what appears to be Biles phone clicked into Skinner's account, which is inaccessible. "When she blocks Simone," Chiles captioned the post.ГӮ

oop IГўВҖВҷve been blocked Г°ВҹВ‘ВҖГ°ВҹВ«ВўГ°ВҹВҳВӮ
